attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- dataviz: Use this skill whenever you are about to create ANY chart, graph, plot, dashboard, or data visualization, in ANY output medium — an HTML or React artifact, inline SVG, plotting code in any library (matplotlib, plotly, d3, Recharts, …), an image/PNG you will render and upload, or a chart shared into Slack. Read it BEFORE writing the first line of chart code, choosing chart colors, building a stat tile / meter / KPI row, or laying out a dashboard. Produces visualizations that read as one system — elegant, accessible, consistent in light and dark — using a brand-neutral placeholder palette you swap for your own. Teaches a design-system-agnostic method: a form heuristic, a color formula with a runnable validator, mark specs, and interaction rules. A validated default palette is documented in `references/palette.md` — swap that file's values for your brand's. Triggers on: "chart", "graph", "plot", "data viz", "visualization", "dashboard", "analytics", "visualize data", "categorical colors", "sequential / diverging palette", "stat tile", "sparkline", "heatmap", "legend", "axis", "tooltip", "chart colors", "color by series".
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by exercising it end-to-end and observing behavior — drive the affected flow, not just tests or typecheck. Run before committing nontrivial changes; bootstraps this repo's project verify skill if none exists yet. Don't invoke it on a diff that only touches tests, docs, or other code with no runtime surface to drive (a change to product source always has one) — there's nothing to observe.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a GitHub pull request; for your working diff use /code-review
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <what_happened>Read</what_happened>
  <occurred_at>2026-07-07T05:19:28.594Z</occurred_at>
  <working_directory>G:\Cocos_Project\uk_pirates_queen</working_directory>
  <parameters>"{\"file_path\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_pirates_queen\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\Common\\\\AsyncUtils.ts\"}"</parameters>
  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_pirates_queen\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\Common\\\\AsyncUtils.ts\",\"content\":\"// scripts/AsyncUtils.ts\\n\\nimport { director, Director, Component, Node } from 'cc';\\n\\n/**\\n * AsyncUtils 非同步工具函式庫\\n * 提供與 Cocos Creator 引擎生命週期整合的非同步操作\\n * \\n * ===== 基本使用範例 =====\\n * \\n * // 1. 等待指定秒數\\n * await WaitForSeconds(1.5);  // 等待 1.5 秒\\n * \\n * // 2. 等待條件滿足\\n * let isAnimationFinished = false;\\n * spine.setCompleteListener(() => isAnimationFinished = true);\\n * await WaitUntil(() => isAnimationFinished);  // 等待動畫完成\\n * \\n * // 3. 等待指定幀數\\n * await WaitFrames(30);  // 等待 30 幀（約 0.5 秒 @60fps）\\n * \\n * // 4. 等待下一幀\\n * await WaitNextFrame();  // 等待下一個渲染幀\\n * \\n * ===== CancelToken 進階使用範例 =====\\n * \\n * // 創建取消控制器\\n * const cancelToken = CreateCancelToken();\\n * \\n * // 在另一個地方取消操作（使用 Cocos 調度器）\\n * const scheduler = SchedulerManager.getInstance();\\n * scheduler.scheduleOnce(() => {\\n *     cancelToken.isCancelled = true;  // 3 秒後取消\\n * }, 3);\\n * \\n * // 使用取消控制器\\n * try {\\n *     await WaitForSeconds(5, cancelToken);  // 等待 5 秒，但可能被提前取消\\n *     console.log(\\\"正常完成\\\");\\n * } catch (error) {\\n *     console.log(\\\"被取消了\\\");\\n * }\\n * \\n * ===== 遊戲場景實際應用範例 =====\\n * \\n * // 範例 1: 等待玩家點擊確認\\n * class GameState {\\n *     async WaitForPlayerConfirm(): Promise<void> {\\n *         let isConfirmed = false;\\n *         const cancelToken = CreateCancelToken();\\n *         \\n *         // 設定 10 秒超時（使用 Cocos 調度器）\\n *         const scheduler = SchedulerManager.getInstance();\\n *         scheduler.scheduleOnce(() => cancelToken.isCancelled = true, 10);\\n *         \\n *         // 監聽點擊事件\\n *         this.confirmButton.on('click', () => isConfirmed = true);\\n *         \\n *         // 等待確認或超時\\n *         await WaitUntil(() => isConfirmed, cancelToken);\\n *     }\\n * }\\n * \\n * // 範例 2: 免費遊戲結束等待大獎動畫\\n * class LeaveFreeState {\\n *     async PlayFreeGameTotalWinAward(): Promise<void> {\\n *         let isPlayAward = true;\\n *         const cancelToken = CreateCancelToken();\\n *         \\n *         // 播放大獎動畫，完成時設定標誌\\n *         this.gameView.ShowBigWin(totalWin, winType, () => {\\n *             isPlayAward = false;\\n *         });\\n *         \\n *         // 等待動畫完成，支援玩家點擊跳過\\n *         this.skipButton.on('click', () => cancelToken.isCancelled = true);\\n *         await WaitUntil(() => !isPlayAward, cancelToken);\\n *     }\\n * }\\n * \\n * // 範例 3: 轉輪停止序列\\n * class SpinController {\\n *     async StopReelsSequentially(): Promise<void> {\\n *         const cancelToken = CreateCancelToken();\\n *         \\n *         // 如果玩家按下快速停止，取消延遲\\n *         this.quickStopButton.on('click', () => cancelToken.isCancelled = true);\\n *         \\n *         for (let i = 0; // 最小100像素高度\\n\\n            const controlPoint = new Vec3(midX, midY + heightOffset, 0);\\n\\n            // 建立貝茲曲線物件（3階貝茲曲線：起始點、控制點、結束點）\\n            const bezierCurve = new CommonEffect.Bezier([startWorldPosition, controlPoint, endWorldPosition]);\\n\\n            // 設定起始位置\\n            flyNode.setWorldPosition(startWorldPosition);\\n\\n            // 使用臨時物件追蹤動畫進度\\n            const animationTarget = { progress: 0 };\\n            tween(animationTarget)\\n                .to(duration, { progress: 1 }, {\\n                    onUpdate: (target, ratio) => {\\n                        // 使用 CommonEffect.Bezier 計算當前位置\\n                        const currentPos = bezierCurve.GetPosition(ratio);\\n                        flyNode.setWorldPosition(currentPos);\\n                    }\\n                })\\n                .call(() => {\\n                    // 確保最終位置正確\\n                    flyNode.setWorldPosition(endWorldPosition);\\n\\n                    // 調用完成回調\\n                    if (callback) {\\n                        callback();\\n                    }\\n\\n                    resolve();\\n                })\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * 貝茲曲線移動動畫（新版）\\n     * - 回傳可操作的 tween 與可 await 的 done Promise\\n     * - 不自動 .start()，由呼叫端決定何時開始\\n     */\\n    static BezierMoveToWithTween(\\n        flyNode: Node,\\n        startWorldPosition: Vec3,\\n        endWorldPosition: Vec3,\\n        duration: number,\\n        callback?: () => void\\n    ): { tween: Tween<{ progress: number }> | null; done: Promise<void> } {\\n        let resolveDone: () => void;\\n        const done = new Promise<void>((resolve) => { resolveDone = resolve; });\\n\\n        if (!flyNode || !flyNode.isValid) {\\n            console.warn(\\\"BezierMoveToWithTween: flyNode is null or invalid\\\");\\n            if (callback) callback();\\n            resolveDone();\\n            return { tween: null, done };\\n        }\\n\\n        // 計算控制點（在起始點和結束點之間的上方創建一個弧形路徑）\\n        const midX = (startWorldPosition.x + endWorldPosition.x) / 2;\\n        const midY = (startWorldPosition.y + endWorldPosition.y) / 2;\\n\\n        // 計算高度偏移：基於起始點和結束點之間的距離\\n        const distance = Vec3.distance(startWorldPosition, endWorldPosition);\\n        const heightOffset = Math.max(100, distance * 0.3); // 最小100像素高度\\n\\n        const controlPoint = new Vec3(midX, midY + heightOffset, 0);\\n\\n        // 建立貝茲曲線物件（3階貝茲曲線：起始點、控制點、結束點）\\n        const bezierCurve = new CommonEffect.Bezier([startWorldPosition, controlPoint, endWorldPosition]);\\n\\n        // 設定起始位置\\n        flyNode.setWorldPosition(startWorldPosition);\\n\\n        // 使用臨時物件追蹤動畫進度\\n        const animationTarget = { progress: 0 };\\n        const tw = tween(animationTarget)\\n            .to(duration, { progress: 1 }, {\\n                onUpdate: (target, ratio) => {\\n                    const currentPos = bezierCurve.GetPosition(ratio);\\n                    flyNode.setWorldPosition(currentPos);\\n                }\\n            })\\n            .call(() => {\\n                flyNode.setWorldPosition(endWorldPosition);\\n                if (callback) {\\n                    callback();\\n                }\\n                resolveDone();\\n            });\\n\\n        return { tween: tw, done };\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\",\"numLines\":95,\"startLine\":390,\"totalLines\":807}}"</outcome>

}\\n  get currentTime(): number { return this.elapsed; }\\n\\n  /** 取得所有正在等待 signal 的軌道資訊 */\\n  get waitingTracks(): Array<{ trackId: string; waitingSignal: string }> {\\n    return this.trackStates\\n      .filter((ts) => ts.waitingSignal)\\n      .map((ts) => ({ trackId: ts.trackId, waitingSignal: ts.waitingSignal! }));\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 取得所有已定義的 signal（含是否已觸發） */\\n  get signalStatus(): Array<{ id: string; fired: boolean; at?: number }> {\\n    if (!this.asset) return [];\\n    return this.asset.signals.map((s) => ({ id: s.id, fired: this.firedSignals.has(s.id), at: s.at }));\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 載入 timeline 資料 */\\n  load(asset: TimelineAsset, callbacks?: PlayerCallbacks): void {\\n    this.asset = asset;\\n    this.callbacks = callbacks ?? {};\\n    this.reset();\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 開始播放 */\\n  play(): void {\\n    if (!this.asset || this._state === PlayState.Playing) return;\\n    this._state = PlayState.Playing;\\n    // 觸發所有軌道的第一個 clip\\n    for (const ts of this.trackStates) {\\n      this.startClip(ts);\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 暫停 */\\n  pause(): void {\\n    if (this._state === PlayState.Playing) this._state = PlayState.Paused;\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 恢復 */\\n  resume(): void {\\n    if (this._state === PlayState.Paused) this._state = PlayState.Playing;\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 停止並重置 */\\n  stop(): void {\\n    this._state = PlayState.Idle;\\n    this.reset();\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 外部發送 signal（解除等待中的軌道） */\\n  emitSignal(signalId: string): void {\\n    for (const ts of this.trackStates) {\\n      if (ts.waitingSignal === signalId) {\\n        ts.waitingSignal = undefined;\\n        ts.paused = false;\\n        this.advanceTrack(ts);\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 每幀呼叫（dt 秒） */\\n  tick(dt: number): void {\\n    if (this._state !== PlayState.Playing || !this.asset) return;\\n\\n    this.elapsed += dt;\\n\\n    // 檢查 time-based signals（防重複）\\n    for (const sig of this.asset.signals) {\\n      if (sig.at != null && this.elapsed >= sig.at && !this.firedSignals.has(sig.id)) {\\n        this.firedSignals.add(sig.id);\\n        this.emitSignal(sig.id);\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    // 檢查事件觸發\\n    for (let i = 0; i < this.asset.events.length; i++) {\\n      const ev = this.asset.events[i];\\n      if (this.elapsed >= ev.time) {\\n        this.eventBus.emit(ev, i);\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    // 推進各軌道\\n    let allFinished = true;\\n    for (const ts of this.trackStates) {\\n      if (ts.paused) { allFinished = false; continue; }\\n      const track = this.getTrack(ts.trackId);\\n      if (!track) continue;\\n      const clip = track.clips[ts.currentClipIndex];\\n      if (!clip) continue; // 軌道已結束\\n\\n      ts.clipElapsed += dt;\\n\\n      if (clip.duration > 0 && ts.clipElapsed >= clip.duration) {\\n        // clip 結束\\n        this.callbacks.onClipEnd?.({ track, clip, clipIndex: ts.currentClipIndex });\\n        this.advanceTrack(ts);\\n      }\\n\\n      if (ts.currentClipIndex < track.clips.length) allFinished = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    if (allFinished) {\\n      this._state = PlayState.Finished;\\n      this.callbacks.onFinished?.();\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  // ─── Private ───────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n  private reset(): void {\\n    this.elapsed = 0;\\n    this.eventBus.reset();\\n    this.firedSignals.clear();\\n    if (!this.asset) { this.trackStates = []; return; }\\n    this.trackStates = this.asset.tracks.map((t) => ({\\n      trackId: t.id,\\n      currentClipIndex: 0,\\n      clipElapsed: 0,\\n      paused: false,\\n    }));\\n  }\\n\\n  private getTrack(id: string): TrackData | undefined {\\n    return this.asset?.tracks.find((t) => t.id === id);\\n  }\\n\\n  private startClip(ts: TrackState): void {\\n    const track = this.getTrack(ts.trackId);\\n    if (!track) return;\\n    const clip = track.clips[ts.currentClipIndex];\\n    if (!clip) return;\\n\\n    // duration=-1 表示等待 signal\\n    if (clip.duration < 0) {\\n      ts.paused = true;\\n      ts.waitingSignal = clip.name; // 預設用 clip name 作為 signal ID\\n    }\\n\\n    this.callbacks.onClipStart?.({ track, clip, clipIndex: ts.currentClipIndex });\\n  }\\n\\n  private advanceTrack(ts: TrackState): void {\\n    ts.currentClipIndex++;\\n    ts.clipElapsed = 0;\\n    ts.paused = false;\\n    ts.waitingSignal = undefined;\\n    this.startClip(ts);\\n  }\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":184,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":184}}"</outcome>
</observed_from_primary_session>

content.thinking:
The user is reading TimelinePlayer.ts, which has the O(tracks²) issue mentioned in the request:
- Line 120 and 157 use `getTrack(ts.trackId)` which calls `Array.find(t => t.id === id)` on every frame for each track
- This is inefficient and creates closures

The suggestion is to build a Map during load() or store track references directly in TrackState.

Still waiting for implementation before recording observations.

// 最小100像素高度\\n\\n            const controlPoint = new Vec3(midX, midY + heightOffset, 0);\\n\\n            // 建立貝茲曲線物件（3階貝茲曲線：起始點、控制點、結束點）\\n            const bezierCurve = new CommonEffect.Bezier([startLocalPosition, controlPoint, endLocalPosition]);\\n\\n            // 設定起始位置\\n            flyNode.setPosition(startLocalPosition);\\n\\n            // 使用臨時物件追蹤動畫進度\\n            const animationTarget = { progress: 0 };\\n            tween(animationTarget)\\n                .to(duration, { progress: 1 }, {\\n                    onUpdate: (target, ratio) => {\\n                        // 使用 CommonEffect.Bezier 計算當前位置\\n                        const currentPos = bezierCurve.GetPosition(ratio);\\n                        flyNode.setPosition(currentPos);\\n                    }\\n                })\\n                .call(() => {\\n                    // 確保最終位置正確\\n                    flyNode.setPosition(endLocalPosition);\\n\\n                    // 調用完成回調\\n                    if (callback) {\\n                        callback();\\n                    }\\n\\n                    resolve();\\n                })\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * 貝茲曲線移動動畫（本地座標版本，新版）\\n     * - 回傳可操作的 tween 與可 await 的 done Promise\\n     * - 不自動 .start()，由呼叫端決定何時開始\\n     */\\n    static BezierMoveToLocalPositionWithTween(\\n        flyNode: Node,\\n        startLocalPosition: Vec3,\\n        endLocalPosition: Vec3,\\n        duration: number,\\n        callback?: () => void\\n    ): { tween: Tween<{ progress: number }> | null; // 最小100像素高度\\n\\n        const controlPoint = new Vec3(midX, midY + heightOffset, 0);\\n\\n        // 建立貝茲曲線物件（3階貝茲曲線：起始點、控制點、結束點）\\n        const bezierCurve = new CommonEffect.Bezier([startLocalPosition, controlPoint, endLocalPosition]);\\n\\n        // 設定起始位置\\n        flyNode.setPosition(startLocalPosition);\\n\\n        // 使用臨時物件追蹤動畫進度\\n        const animationTarget = { progress: 0 };\\n        const tw = tween(animationTarget)\\n            .to(duration, { progress: 1 }, {\\n                onUpdate: (target, ratio) => {\\n                    const currentPos = bezierCurve.GetPosition(ratio);\\n                    flyNode.setPosition(currentPos);\\n                }\\n            })\\n            .call(() => {\\n                flyNode.setPosition(endLocalPosition);\\n                if (callback) {\\n                    callback();\\n                }\\n                resolveDone();\\n            });\\n\\n        return { tween: tw, done };\\n    }\",\"numLines\":95,\"startLine\":585,\"totalLines\":807}}"</outcome>

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_pirates_queen\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\ShowAward\\\\WinEffectCtrl.ts\",\"content\":\"import {_decorator, Component} from 'cc';\\nconst {ccclass, property} = _decorator;\\n\\nimport {NumberAnimation} from '../Common/NumberAnimation';\\n\\n@ccclass('WinEffectCtrl')\\nexport class WinEffectCtrl extends Component {\\n  @property({type: NumberAnimation, displayName: '數字動畫組件'})\\n  protected m_WinLabel: NumberAnimation = null;\\n  \\n  protected m_FinishCallback: Function = null;\\n\\n  /**@en Initialization flag @ch 初始化標記 */\\n  private m_IsInitialized: boolean = false;\\n\\n  /**@en Load component @ch 載入組件 */\\n  public onLoad() {\\n    this.Initialize();\\n  }\\n\\n  /**@en Initialize component @ch 初始化組件 */\\n  private Initialize(): void {\\n    if (this.m_IsInitialized)\\n      return; // 避免重複初始化\\n\\n    this.m_IsInitialized = true;\\n    if (this.m_WinLabel !== null && this.m_WinLabel.FinishDelegate !== null) {\\n      this.m_WinLabel.FinishDelegate.insert(this.StopEffect, this);\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  /**@en Destroy component @ch 銷毀組件 */\\n  public onDestroy() {\\n    if (this.m_WinLabel !== null && this.m_WinLabel.FinishDelegate !== null) {\\n      this.m_WinLabel.FinishDelegate.remove(this.StopEffect, this);\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  /**@en Force skip effect @ch 強制跳過報獎效果 */\\n  public ForceSkipEffect(): void {\\n    if (this.m_WinLabel !== undefined) {\\n      this.m_WinLabel.StopAndJumpToTarget();\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  /**@en Play effect @ch 播放報獎效果 */\\n  public PlayEffect(\\n    winNum: number,\\n    finishTime: number,\\n    callback?: Function,\\n    target?\\n  ): void {\\n    this.Initialize();\\n\\n    if (callback !== null) this.m_FinishCallback = callback.bind(target);\\n    this.PlayNumberAnimation(winNum, finishTime);\\n  }\\n\\n  /**\\n   * @ch 播放數字動畫（子類可覆寫）\\n   */\\n  protected PlayNumberAnimation(winNum: number, finishTime: number): void {\\n    if (this.m_WinLabel !== null) {\\n      this.m_WinLabel.Reset();\\n      this.m_WinLabel.PlayRolling(0, winNum, finishTime);\\n    } else {\\n      this.scheduleOnce(this.StopEffect, finishTime);\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  /**@en Stop effect @ch 停止報獎效果 */\\n  public StopEffect(): void {\\n    this.unschedule(this.StopEffect);\\n    if (this.m_FinishCallback !== null) {\\n      this.m_FinishCallback();\\n    }\\n  }\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":79,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":79}}"</outcome>
</observed_from_primary_session>

  <outcome>"{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_pirates_queen\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\Common\\\\AsyncUtils.ts\",\"oldString\":\"    public scheduleOnce(callback: () => void, delay: number): void {\\n        this.m_dummyComponent.scheduleOnce(callback, delay);\\n    }\\n\\n    public unschedule(callback: () => void): void {\\n        this.m_dummyComponent.unschedule(callback);\\n    }\\n}\",\"newString\":\"    public scheduleOnce(callback: () => void, delay: number): void {\\n        this.m_dummyComponent.scheduleOnce(callback, delay);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 每幀重複呼叫（interval = 0），resolve 時務必配對 unschedule */\\n    public schedule(callback: () => void): void {\\n        this.m_dummyComponent.schedule(callback, 0);\\n    }\\n\\n    public unschedule(callback: () => void): void {\\n        this.m_dummyComponent.unschedule(callback);\\n    }\\n}\",\"originalFile\":\"// scripts/AsyncUtils.ts\\n\\nimport { director, Director, Component, Node } from 'cc';\\n\\n/**\\n * AsyncUtils 非同步工具函式庫\\n * 提供與 Cocos Creator 引擎生命週期整合的非同步操作\\n * \\n * ===== 基本使用範例 =====\\n * \\n * // 1. 等待指定秒數\\n * await WaitForSeconds(1.5);  // 等待 30 幀（約 0.5 秒 @60fps）\\n * \\n * // 4. 等待下一幀\\n * await WaitNextFrame();  // 等待下一個渲染幀\\n * \\n * ===== CancelToken 進階使用範例 =====\\n * \\n * // 創建取消控制器\\n * const cancelToken = CreateCancelToken();\\n * \\n * // 在另一個地方取消操作（使用 Cocos 調度器）\\n * const scheduler = SchedulerManager.getInstance();\\n * scheduler.scheduleOnce(() => {\\n *     cancelToken.isCancelled = true; I should wait for more edits to see the complete implementation before recording observations.

  <outcome>"{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_pirates_queen\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\Common\\\\AsyncUtils.ts\",\"oldString\":\"export function WaitUntil(condition: () => boolean, cancelToken?: CancelToken): Promise<void> {\\n    return new Promise(resolve => {\\n        function check() {\\n            if (cancelToken?.isCancelled) { resolve(); return; }\\n\\n        // 常駐 schedule 配對解除（原每幀 director.once 重新註冊，等待期間每幀配置 wrapper）\\n        const scheduler = SchedulerManager.getInstance();\\n        const check = () => {\\n            if (cancelToken?.isCancelled || condition()) {\\n                scheduler.unschedule(check);\\n                resolve();\\n            }\\n        };\\n        scheduler.schedule(check);\\n    });\\n}\",\"originalFile\":\"// scripts/AsyncUtils.ts\\n\\nimport { director, Director, Component, Node } from 'cc';\\n\\n/**\\n * AsyncUtils 非同步工具函式庫\\n * 提供與 Cocos Creator 引擎生命週期整合的非同步操作\\n * \\n * ===== 基本使用範例 =====\\n * \\n * // 1. 等待指定秒數\\n * await WaitForSeconds(1.5);  // 等待 1.5 秒\\n * \\n * // 2. 等待條件滿足\\n * let isAnimationFinished = false;\\n * spine.setCompleteListener(() => isAnimationFinished = true);\\n * await WaitUntil(() => isAnimationFinished);  // 等待動畫完成\\n * \\n * // 3. 等待指定幀數\\n * await WaitFrames(30);  // 等待 30 幀（約 0.5 秒 @60fps）\\n * \\n * // 4. 等待下一幀\\n * await WaitNextFrame();  // 等待下一個渲染幀\\n * \\n * ===== CancelToken 進階使用範例 =====\\n * \\n * // 創建取消控制器\\n * const cancelToken = CreateCancelToken();\\n * \\n * // 在另一個地方取消操作（使用 Cocos 調度器）\\n * const scheduler = SchedulerManager.getInstance();\\n * scheduler.scheduleOnce(() => {\\n *     cancelToken.isCancelled = true;  // 3 秒後取消\\n * }, 3);\\n * \\n * // 使用取消控制器\\n * try {\\n *     await WaitForSeconds(5, cancelToken);  // 等待 5 秒，但可能被提前取消\\n *     console.log(\\\"正常完成\\\");\\n * } catch (error) {\\n *     console.log(\\\"被取消了\\\");\\n * }\\n * \\n * ===== 遊戲場景實際應用範例 =====\\n * \\n * // 範例 1: 等待玩家點擊確認\\n * class GameState {\\n *     async WaitForPlayerConfirm(): Promise<void> {\\n *         let isConfirmed = false;\\n *         const cancelToken = CreateCancelToken();\\n *         \\n *         // 設定 10 秒超時（使用 Cocos 調度器）\\n *         const scheduler = SchedulerManager.getInstance();\\n *         scheduler.scheduleOnce(() => cancelToken.isCancelled = true, 10);\\n *         \\n *         // 監聽點擊事件\\n *         this.confirmButton.on('click', () => isConfirmed = true);\\n *         \\n *         // 等待確認或超時\\n *         await WaitUntil(() => isConfirmed, cancelToken);\\n *     }\\n * }\\n * \\n * // 範例 2: 免費遊戲結束等待大獎動畫\\n * class LeaveFreeState {\\n *     async PlayFreeGameTotalWinAward(): Promise<void> {\\n *         let isPlayAward = true;\\n *         const cancelToken = CreateCancelToken();\\n *         \\n *         // 播放大獎動畫，完成時設定標誌\\n *         this.gameView.ShowBigWin(totalWin, winType, () => {\\n *             isPlayAward = false;\\n *         });\\n *         \\n *         // 等待動畫完成，支援玩家點擊跳過\\n *         this.skipButton.on('click', () => cancelToken.isCancelled = true);\\n *         await WaitUntil(() => !isPlayAward, cancelToken);\\n *     }\\n * }\\n * \\n * // 範例 3: 轉輪停止序列\\n * class SpinController {\\n *     async StopReelsSequentially(): Promise<void> {\\n *         const cancelToken = CreateCancelToken();\\n *         \\n *         // 如果玩家按下快速停止，取消延遲\\n *         this.quickStopButton.on('click', () => cancelToken.isCancelled = true);\\n *         \\n *         for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {\\n *             this.stopReel(i);\\n *             await WaitForSeconds(0.2, cancelToken);  // 每個轉輪間隔 0.2 秒停止\\n *         }\\n *     }\\n * }\\n * \\n * ===== 注意事項 =====\\n * \\n * 1. 所有函式都使用 Cocos Creator 的調度器系統，與引擎生命週期同步\\n * 2. CancelToken 是簡單的物件，設定 isCancelled = true 即可取消\\n * 3. 被取消的 Promise 會立即 resolve，不會拋出例外\\n * 4. 在場景切換時，調度器會自動清理，避免記憶體洩漏\\n * 5. 使用 await 語法時，確保函式標記為 async\\n */\\n\\nexport type CancelToken = { Component;\\n\\n    private constructor() {\\n        // 創建一個虛擬的 Node 和 Component 用於調度\\n        const dummyNode = new Node('AsyncUtilsScheduler');\\n        this.m_dummyComponent = dummyNode.addComponent(Component);\\n        // 將節點添加到場景中，但設為持久化\\n        director.getScene()?.addChild(dummyNode);\\n        director.addPersistRootNode(dummyNode);\\n    }\\n\\n    public static getInstance(): SchedulerManager {\\n        if (!SchedulerManager.m_instance) {\\n            SchedulerManager.m_instance = new SchedulerManager();\\n        }\\n        return SchedulerManager.m_instance;\\n    }\\n\\n    public scheduleOnce(callback: () => void, delay: number): void {\\n        this.m_dummyComponent.scheduleOnce(callback, delay);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 每幀重複呼叫（interval = 0），resolve 時務必配對 unschedule */\\n    public schedule(callback: () => void): void {\\n        this.m_dummyComponent.schedule(callback, 0);\\n    }\\n\\n    public unschedule(callback: () => void): void {\\n        this.m_dummyComponent.unschedule(callback);\\n    }\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 等待指定秒數（非阻塞）\\n * 使用 Cocos Creator 的調度器系統，與引擎生命週期同步\\n * @param seconds 秒數（例如 1.5）\\n * @param  const scheduler = SchedulerManager.getInstance();\\n\\n        // 創建延遲回調函數\\n        const delayCallback = () => {\\n            if (cancelToken) {\\n                scheduler.unschedule(cancelCheck);\\n            }\\n            if (!isResolved) {\\n                isResolved = true;\\n                resolve();\\n            }\\n        };\\n\\n        // 取消狀態輪詢：常駐 schedule 配對解除\\n        //（原每幀 director.once 重新註冊，等待期間每幀配置 wrapper 造成 GC 壓力）\\n        const cancelCheck = () => {\\n            if (cancelToken.isCancelled) {\\n                scheduler.unschedule(cancelCheck);\\n                scheduler.unschedule(delayCallback);\\n                if (!isResolved) {\\n                    isResolved = true;\\n                    resolve();\\n                }\\n            }\\n        };\\n\\n        if (cancelToken?.isCancelled) {\\n            isResolved = true;\\n            resolve();\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 使用 Cocos 調度器\\n        scheduler.scheduleOnce(delayCallback, seconds);\\n\\n        if (cancelToken) {\\n            scheduler.schedule(cancelCheck);\\n        }\\n    });\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 每 frame 檢查條件直到為 true 為止\\n * @param condition 條件函式\\n * @param cancelToken 可選的取消控制\\n */\\nexport function WaitUntil(condition: () => boolean, cancelToken?: CancelToken): content.thinking:
The primary session is implementing fixes for the AsyncUtils closure allocation issue in WaitForSeconds. Instead of using `director.once` which creates a new closure every frame, they're now using a persistent `schedule` callback that polls the cancel token. This is a significant optimization - it eliminates per-frame allocations during wait periods.

The change:
- Before: `director.once(Director.EVENT_AFTER_UPDATE, cancelCheck)` was called recursively every frame, creating new closures
- After: `scheduler.schedule(cancelCheck)` registers once and polls every frame, then `unschedule` removes it when done

This is the core fix for issue #4 from the user's request.

I should continue waiting for the other fixes to be implemented before recording observations.

content.thinking:
Good! The primary session has now implemented fixes for WaitUntil and WaitFrames in AsyncUtils.ts, eliminating the recursive `director.once` pattern that was causing per-frame closure allocations. These three functions (WaitForSeconds, WaitUntil, WaitFrames) all now use persistent `scheduler.schedule` callbacks instead of registering new closures every frame.

Waiting to see if they continue with the other fixes mentioned in the original request:
- Bezier curve allocations in CommonEffect.ts
- TimelinePlayer linear search
- FreeGame count-up deduplication

content.thinking:
Great! The session is implementing the Bezier optimization. The changes:
1. Changed `GetPosition` from `this.bez.apply(this, [time])` to direct call `this.bez(time)` - removing the array allocation from `.apply`
2. All Bezier2-6 methods now use `this.out.set()` instead of `return v3()` - reusing the shared Vec3 buffer
3. Also converted the factor arrays from `f = [...]` to individual variables `f0, f1, f2...` - removing another array allocation
4. BezierN also uses `this.out.set()` instead of `v3(0, 0)`

This is a comprehensive optimization that eliminates multiple allocations per frame during Bezier curve animations.

Now waiting for the remaining two fixes:
- TimelinePlayer linear search
- FreeGame count-up string deduplication

2. Reuse shared `this.out` Vec3 buffer instead of `v3()` (eliminates Vec3 allocations)
3. Use individual variables instead of factor arrays (eliminates array allocations)

This comprehensively eliminates per-frame allocations in Bezier curve animations. Waiting for the remaining fixes (TimelinePlayer, FreeGame count-up).

  <parameters>"{\"file_path\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_pirates_queen\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\Timeline\\\\TimelinePlayer.ts\",\"old_string\":\"export class TimelinePlayer {\\n  private asset: TimelineAsset | null = null;\\n  private trackStates: TrackState[] = [];\",\"new_string\":\"export class TimelinePlayer {\\n  private asset: TimelineAsset | null = null;\\n  private trackStates: TrackState[] = [];\\n  /** trackId → TrackData 索引（tick 每幀每軌查找，避免 Array.find 線性搜尋 + 閉包配置） */\\n  private trackMap = new Map<string, TrackData>();\",\"replace_all\":false}"</parameters>
  <outcome>"{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_pirates_queen\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\Timeline\\\\TimelinePlayer.ts\",\"oldString\":\"export class TimelinePlayer {\\n  private asset: TimelineAsset | null = null;\\n  private trackStates: TrackState[] = [];\",\"newString\":\"export class TimelinePlayer {\\n  private asset: TimelineAsset | null = null;\\n  private trackStates: TrackState[] = [];\\n  /** trackId → TrackData 索引（tick 每幀每軌查找，避免 Array.find 線性搜尋 + 閉包配置） */\\n  private trackMap = new Map<string, TrackData>();\",\"originalFile\":\"/**\\n * Timeline Player — 播放器核心\\n * 管理時間推進、軌道狀態、clip 切換、signal 等待/恢復。\\n * 不直接操作 Cocos 節點，透過 callback 通知外部 Executor。\\n */\\nimport type { TimelineAsset, TrackData, TrackState, ClipData, SignalData } from \\\"./TimelineData\\\";\\nimport { PlayState } from \\\"./TimelineData\\\";\\nimport { TimelineEventBus } from \\\"./TimelineEvent\\\";\\n\\nexport interface ClipChangeInfo {\\n  track: TrackData;\\n  clip: ClipData;\\n  clipIndex: number;\\n}\\n\\nexport interface PlayerCallbacks {\\n  /** clip 開始播放 */\\n  onClipStart?: (info: ClipChangeInfo) => void;\\n  /** clip 結束 */\\n  onClipEnd?: (info: ClipChangeInfo) => void;\\n  /** timeline 播放完畢 */\\n  onFinished?: () => void;\\n}\\n\\nexport class TimelinePlayer {\\n  private asset: TimelineAsset | null = null;\\n  private trackStates: TrackState[] = [];\\n  private elapsed = 0;\\n  private _state = PlayState.Idle;\\n  private callbacks: PlayerCallbacks = {};\\n  private firedSignals = new Set<string>();\\n  readonly eventBus = new TimelineEventBus();\\n\\n  get state(): PlayState { return this._state; }\\n  get currentTime(): number { return this.elapsed; }\\n\\n  /** 取得所有正在等待 signal 的軌道資訊 */\\n  get waitingTracks(): Array<{ trackId: string; waitingSignal: string }> {\\n    return this.trackStates\\n      .filter((ts) => ts.waitingSignal)\\n      .map((ts) => ({ trackId: ts.trackId, waitingSignal: ts.waitingSignal! }));\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 取得所有已定義的 signal（含是否已觸發） */\\n  get signalStatus(): Array<{ id: string; fired: boolean; at?: number }> {\\n    if (!this.asset) return [];\\n    return this.asset.signals.map((s) => ({ id: s.id, fired: this.firedSignals.has(s.id), at: s.at }));\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 載入 timeline 資料 */\\n  load(asset: TimelineAsset, callbacks?: PlayerCallbacks): void {\\n    this.asset = asset;\\n    this.callbacks = callbacks ?? {};\\n    this.reset();\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 開始播放 */\\n  play(): void {\\n    if (!this.asset || this._state === PlayState.Playing) return;\\n    this._state = PlayState.Playing;\\n    // 觸發所有軌道的第一個 clip\\n    for (const ts of this.trackStates) {\\n      this.startClip(ts);\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 暫停 */\\n  pause(): void {\\n    if (this._state === PlayState.Playing) this._state = PlayState.Paused;\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 恢復 */\\n  resume(): void {\\n    if (this._state === PlayState.Paused) this._state = PlayState.Playing;\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 停止並重置 */\\n  stop(): void {\\n    this._state = PlayState.Idle;\\n    this.reset();\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 外部發送 signal（解除等待中的軌道） */\\n  emitSignal(signalId: string): void {\\n    for (const ts of this.trackStates) {\\n      if (ts.waitingSignal === signalId) {\\n        ts.waitingSignal = undefined;\\n        ts.paused = false;\\n        this.advanceTrack(ts);\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 每幀呼叫（dt 秒） */\\n  tick(dt: number): void {\\n    if (this._state !== PlayState.Playing || !this.asset) return;\\n\\n    this.elapsed += dt;\\n\\n    // 檢查 time-based signals（防重複）\\n    for (const sig of this.asset.signals) {\\n      if (sig.at != null && this.elapsed >= sig.at && !this.firedSignals.has(sig.id)) {\\n        this.firedSignals.add(sig.id);\\n        this.emitSignal(sig.id);\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    // 檢查事件觸發\\n    for (let i = 0; i < this.asset.events.length; i++) {\\n      const ev = this.asset.events[i];\\n      if (this.elapsed >= ev.time) {\\n        this.eventBus.emit(ev, i);\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    // 推進各軌道\\n    let allFinished = true;\\n    for (const ts of this.trackStates) {\\n      if (ts.paused) { allFinished = false; continue; }\\n      const track = this.getTrack(ts.trackId);\\n      if (!track) continue;\\n      const clip = track.clips[ts.currentClipIndex];\\n      if (!clip) continue; // 軌道已結束\\n\\n      ts.clipElapsed += dt;\\n\\n      if (clip.duration > 0 && ts.clipElapsed >= clip.duration) {\\n        // clip 結束\\n        this.callbacks.onClipEnd?.({ track, clip, clipIndex: ts.currentClipIndex });\\n        this.advanceTrack(ts);\\n      }\\n\\n      if (ts.currentClipIndex < track.clips.length) allFinished = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    if (allFinished) {\\n      this._state = PlayState.Finished;\\n      this.callbacks.onFinished?.();\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  // ─── Private ───────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n  private reset(): void {\\n    this.elapsed = 0;\\n    this.eventBus.reset();\\n    this.firedSignals.clear();\\n    if (!this.asset) { this.trackStates = []; return; }\\n    this.trackStates = this.asset.tracks.map((t) => ({\\n      trackId: t.id,\\n      currentClipIndex: 0,\\n      clipElapsed: 0,\\n      paused: false,\\n    }));\\n  }\\n\\n  private getTrack(id: string): TrackData | undefined {\\n    return this.asset?.tracks.find((t) => t.id === id);\\n  }\\n\\n  private startClip(ts: TrackState): void {\\n    const track = this.getTrack(ts.trackId);\\n    if (!track) return;\\n    const clip = track.clips[ts.currentClipIndex];\\n    if (!clip) return;\\n\\n    // duration=-1 表示等待 signal\\n    if (clip.duration < 0) {\\n      ts.paused = true;\\n      ts.waitingSignal = clip.name; // 預設用 clip name 作為 signal ID\\n    }\\n\\n    this.callbacks.onClipStart?.({ track, clip, clipIndex: ts.currentClipIndex });\\n  }\\n\\n  private advanceTrack(ts: TrackState): void {\\n    ts.currentClipIndex++;\\n    ts.clipElapsed = 0;\\n    ts.paused = false;\\n    ts.waitingSignal = undefined;\\n    this.startClip(ts);\\n  }\\n}\\n\",\"structuredPatch\":[{\"oldStart\":25,\"oldLines\":6,\"newStart\":25,\"newLines\":8,\"lines\":[\" export class TimelinePlayer {\",\"   private asset: TimelineAsset | null = null;\",\"   private trackStates: TrackState[] = [];\",\"+  /** trackId → TrackData 索引（tick 每幀每軌查找，避免 Array.find 線性搜尋 + 閉包配置） */\",\"+  private trackMap = new Map<string, TrackData>();\",\"   private elapsed = 0;\",\"   private _state = PlayState.Idle;\",\"   private callbacks: PlayerCallbacks = {};\"]}],\"userModified\":false,\"replaceAll\":false}"</outcome>
</observed_from_primary_session>

content.thinking:
Great! Now the TimelinePlayer optimization is complete:
1. Added a trackMap for O(1) lookups
2. Populate the map in reset()
3. Replace Array.find() with Map.get() in getTrack()

This eliminates the O(tracks²) per-frame linear search and closure allocation issue.

Now waiting for the last fix - the FreeGame count-up deduplication.

content.text:

- Map is populated in `reset()` 
- `getTrack()` now uses O(1) `Map.get()` instead of O(n) `Array.find()`

This eliminates per-frame linear search and closure allocations in the tick loop. Waiting for the final fix (FreeGame count-up deduplication).

content.thinking:
The primary session has completed the FreeGame count-up optimization in FreeGameUIManager.ts:
- Moved the string concatenation and Label write inside the `if (cur > lastShown)` block
- This means the string is only built and written when the displayed value actually changes (when an integer increment happens)
- Before, the string was built and written every frame regardless of whether the value changed

This completes the 4th optimization item mentioned in the original request. Now I should wait to see if there's a fifth item about NumberAnimation.ts that needs addressing, or if the session will commit these changes.

content.text:
I'm observing the primary session completing the FreeGame count-up optimization in FreeGameUIManager.ts. The string concatenation and Label write are now only executed when the integer value actually changes (`cur > lastShown`), instead of every frame. This eliminates wasteful string operations and DOM writes during the tween animation.

All four performance optimizations from the user's request have now been implemented:
1. AsyncUtils wait functions - persistent schedule instead of per-frame closures ✓
2. Bezier curve allocations - shared Vec3 buffer instead of new v3() ✓
3. TimelinePlayer - Map lookup instead of Array.find ✓
4. FreeGame count-up - deduplication of Label writes ✓

Waiting to see if the session addresses the 5th item mentioned (NumberAnimation.ts) or commits these changes.

Perfect! The session has now completed all 5 performance optimizations:

1. AsyncUtils wait functions - replaced recursive `director.once` with persistent `scheduler.schedule` ✓
2. Bezier curve allocations - replaced `v3()` and array allocations with shared `this.out` Vec3 buffer ✓
3. TimelinePlayer - replaced `Array.find()` with O(1) Map lookup ✓
4. FreeGame count-up - moved string concatenation inside `if (cur > lastShown)` deduplication check ✓
5. NumberAnimation UpdateDisplay - added `m_lastShownText` deduplication to avoid redundant Label writes ✓

All the optimizations eliminate per-frame allocations and redundant operations during animation loops. This should significantly reduce GC pressure during FreeGame flows and animation sequences.

I should wait to see if these changes get committed before creating observations.
